pos_sentences.text: Faculty, college campus, studies, activities, college trips
pos_sentences.name: Zainab Khatoon

pos_sentences.text: College campus is very good and calm environment
pos_sentences.name: Shafiya begum

pos_sentences.text: Equal treatment and authority given to the boys and girls
pos_sentences.name: Hafsah Begum

pos_sentences.text: Infrastructure is good and the faculties are very experienced
pos_sentences.name: Hafsah Begum

pos_sentences.text: Frequency of exams and clinical exposure is there for
pos_sentences.name: Hafsah Begum

pos_sentences.text: The festivals which are celebrated and the enjoyment is just out of the world
pos_sentences.name: Saba Fathima

pos_sentences.text: Faculties are good in teaching .and maintain a good rapo with the students ane every thing will be explain un deatil and doubt will b clear then and there
pos_sentences.name: Afiya Begum

pos_sentences.text: Class facilities are good ,maintain hygiene ,safety and security for all students
pos_sentences.name: Afiya Begum

pos_sentences.text: Anti ragging community is also good .provide all facilities to students
pos_sentences.name: Afiya Begum

pos_sentences.text: The events are all celebrated in the campus and by college faculty
pos_sentences.name: Maheen

neg_sentences.text: Not the faculties but the staff is with religious feelings
neg_sentences.name: Hafsah Begum

neg_sentences.text: Most of the faculty members are aged so they don't talk properly and doesn't explain properly
neg_sentences.name: Saba Fathima

neg_sentences.text: The classes as there is no ventilation in the classes
neg_sentences.name: Saba Fathima

neg_sentences.text: No cultural fest in college  only focus in studies not in extra curricul.no trip for students
neg_sentences.name: Afiya Begum

neg_sentences.text: Very strictly every faculty will treat witj students
neg_sentences.name: Afiya Begum

neg_sentences.text: The college management gives work load and study load very much there is no proper arrangement for studies
neg_sentences.name: Maheen

neg_sentences.text: The faculty sometimes are very rude and not at all friendly
neg_sentences.name: Maheen

neg_sentences.text: Mandatory Attendance, Not much holidays, wahrooms.
neg_sentences.name: Jangam basayappa
